name: Nguyen Tri Dung
role: CTO · Technical Founder · Applied AI Builder
title: Engineering leadership, applied AI, and AI-native software execution
description: I work across product architecture, engineering systems, and applied AI delivery. My background spans platform engineering in Japan, founding and scaling Fabbi, shipping computer vision products, and recent work on coding agents and software modernization.
footerNote: Personal profile and writing on practical technology execution.
contactCta: Open to CTO, engineering leadership, and applied AI conversations.

heroStats.label: Current focus
heroStats.value: LLM systems, coding agents, software modernization

currentSignals: Operating from a CTO profile with strong delivery ownership and architecture depth.
Focused on practical Generative AI inside real software engineering workflows.
Building systems that move from architecture decision to shipped capability.

trajectory.title: Japan engineering years
trajectory.body: Worked in Tokyo at Kayac and DeNA on realtime game systems, search optimization, and production engineering under real traffic and product constraints.

trajectory.title: Community product building
trajectory.body: Co-created Mazii as a Japanese learning product and long-running side project for the Vietnam-Japan learner community.

trajectory.title: Fabbi founding and scale-up
trajectory.body: Co-founded Fabbi, built engineering standards and delivery capability, and helped grow the organization into a large Vietnam-Japan software engineering team.

trajectory.title: Applied AI product development
trajectory.body: Led Fabbi AI and the Fvision program across computer vision, eKYC, OCR, smart building, and edge-plus-cloud deployment concerns.

trajectory.title: Generative AI and agent systems
trajectory.body: Researching open-source LLMs, tokenizer fundamentals, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Google AI SDK, and deep application of coding agents inside software delivery and legacy understanding workflows.

signatureWork.name: Fabbi
signatureWork.summary: Built the engineering foundation of Fabbi from the founding stage, established delivery standards, and led cross-border execution for clients in Vietnam and Japan.
highlights: Helped scale the engineering organization to 250+ engineers by 2021.
Led architecture and delivery for multi-million-dollar software projects.
Built the technical base for Fabbi AI across OCR, eKYC, chatbot, and computer vision workstreams.

signatureWork.name: TV Tokyo / txbiz
signatureWork.summary: Worked from the early phase of a live streaming platform, video management system, and website-plus-app ecosystem for TV Tokyo. The work included designing microservice architecture and leading the team from the initial build stage under Agile and Scrum delivery.
highlights: From-scratch platform build for a major Japanese media brand.
Ownership across service architecture, team execution, and delivery rhythm.
Integrated web platform, application ecosystem, and video operations concerns in one product landscape.

signatureWork.name: Fvision
signatureWork.summary: Led the Fvision solution for facial recognition and smart building access management, combining deep learning, embedded systems, Android customization, sensors, and deployment engineering.
highlights: Built as a practical applied AI system, not just a lab demo.
Connected AI, IoT, hardware, and operations into a deployable product.

signatureWork.name: Mazii
signatureWork.summary: Built a Japanese learning and lookup product for learners in the Vietnam-Japan ecosystem, combining product intuition, language tooling, and sustained iteration over time.
highlights: Started as an independent side project with community utility at the center.
Became a recognizable product in the Japanese learning space.
Reflects an enduring interest in useful products, not just client delivery.

focusAreas.name: AI for software delivery
focusAreas.description: Apply Generative AI to reduce friction in coding, review, documentation, and architecture understanding for real engineering teams.
focusAreas.stack: Open-source LLMs, coding agents, workflow orchestration

focusAreas.name: Legacy reverse engineering
focusAreas.description: Convert legacy source systems into useful documentation and structured technical knowledge to accelerate modernization.
focusAreas.stack: Source analysis, agent workflows, technical documentation pipelines

focusAreas.name: Agentic product development
focusAreas.description: Build products and internal systems that use AI agents as part of the operating model, not as isolated experiments.
focusAreas.stack: LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Google AI SDK

focusAreas.name: Applied model understanding
focusAreas.description: Study model mechanics and practical constraints deeply enough to make implementation choices that are grounded rather than fashionable.
focusAreas.stack: Tokenizer basics, GAN foundations, inference and integration tradeoffs

recognition.title: Top 20 young technology leaders
recognition.detail: Featured by VnExpress in the 2021 Top 20 young technology leaders selection.

recognition.title: Sao Khue 2021
recognition.detail: Fvision was recognized with Sao Khue 2021.

recognition.title: Cross-border delivery credibility
recognition.detail: Worked across Vietnam and Japan with clients including TV Tokyo and Sony Music Japan.
